title: Simple API Request
scenario: Generate a simple API request that fetches the weather for a given city and country. The API endpoint is 'https://weatherapi.com/v1/weather.json'. The target output should be in the JSON format, with the city name, country code, and weather description.
constraints: Must include the API endpoint URL

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated API request adheres to the constraints provided.
Check if the generated API request is syntactically correct.
